self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: 4pc: while the equipping character has 0 Elemental Energy, Normal Attack DMG +60% and Elemental Burst DMG +60%. Dealing Normal Attack DMG suspends the Burst bonus for 6s and vice versa, so in practice only one applies at a time (use 'normal_attack' or 'elemental_burst'; 'both' is the un-suspended ceiling).
